# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud storage security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account for application logs and backups"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the storage account"
      }
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "application-logs",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the blob container for application logs"
      }
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "backups",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the blob container for backups"
      }
    },
    "allowedSubnetResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Resource ID of the subnet allowed to access the storage account. Leave empty to deny all virtual network access (most restrictive)."
      }
    },
    "allowedIpAddress": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "IP address or CIDR range allowed to access the storage account. Leave empty to not add any IP rules."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "virtualNetworkRules": "[if(empty(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceId')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('id', parameters('allowedSubnetResourceId'), 'action', 'Allow')))]",
    "ipRules": "[if(empty(parameters('allowedIpAddress')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('value', parameters('allowedIpAddress'), 'action', 'Allow')))]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "properties": {
        "accessTier": "Hot",
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "allowSharedKeyAccess": false,
        "allowCrossTenantReplication": false,
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Disabled",
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Deny",
          "bypass": "AzureServices",
          "virtualNetworkRules": "[variables('virtualNetworkRules')]",
          "ipRules": "[variables('ipRules')]"
        },
        "encryption": {
          "services": {
            "blob": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            },
            "file": {
              "enabled": true,
              "keyType": "Account"
            }
          },
          "keySource": "Microsoft.Storage",
          "requireInfrastructureEncryption": true
        }
      },
      "tags": {
        "purpose": "logging-infrastructure",
        "environment": "production"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "deleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 30
        },
        "containerDeleteRetentionPolicy": {
          "enabled": true,
          "days": 30
        },
        "isVersioningEnabled": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', parameters('logsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "application-logs"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/', parameters('backupsContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "None",
        "immutableStorageWithVersioning": {
          "enabled": true
        },
        "metadata": {
          "purpose": "backups"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/storageAccountDiagnostics')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "metrics": [
          {
            "category": "Transaction",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/providers/diagnosticSettings",
      "apiVersion": "2021-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('storageAccountName'), '/default/Microsoft.Insights/blobDiagnostics')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices', parameters('storageAccountName'), 'default')]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "logs": [
          {
            "category": "StorageRead",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          },
          {
            "category": "StorageWrite",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          },
          {
            "category": "StorageDelete",
            "enabled": true,
            "retentionPolicy": {
              "enabled": true,
              "days": 90
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "storageAccountId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    },
    "logsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('logsContainerName')]"
    },
    "backupsContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('backupsContainerName')]"
    },
    "blobEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))).primaryEndpoints.blob]"
    }
  }
}
